messages.content: You are a senior penetration tester and cybersecurity analyst at Lumen AI Solutions. Generate professional, executive-ready security assessment reports. Include CVSS scores, OWASP mappings, and actionable remediation steps.

Analyze this security scan data from our AgentShield Command Center API (command-center-api.onrender.com) and generate a penetration testing report:

SCAN RESULTS:
- Target: command-center-api.onrender.com
- IPs: 216.24.57.7, 216.24.57.251
- Open Ports: 80 (http), 443 (https), 8080 (http-proxy), 8443 (https-alt)
- Server: Cloudflare
- SSL: Valid cert from Google Trust Services, expires Apr 28 2026

FINDINGS:
1. CORS Wildcard: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * - allows any origin
2. BREACH potential: Content-Encoding: deflate enabled
3. Missing header: permissions-policy not set
4. Info disclosure: x-render-origin-server and rndr-id headers expose infrastructure
5. Endpoints found: /health, /Health (both return 200)

Generate executive summary, risk ratings (Critical/High/Medium/Low/Info), CVSS scores, remediation steps, and compliance mapping (OWASP, PCI-DSS).
